---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Uznir
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Feature description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Which role(s) does this affect?
- [ ] Customer (person posting jobs)
- [ ] Worker (person doing jobs)
- [ ] Both
- [ ] Admin

## Motivation
Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution
Describe how you'd like this to work, if you have a preference.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context
Screenshots, mockups, or references to similar features in other apps.
